particulars.description: Leasehold properties known as 74 croydon road, caterham, CR3 6QD, being all of the land and buildings in title SY831010. Leasehold property known as 74 croydon road, caterham, CR3 6QD, being all of the land and buildings in title SY831011, for further details of properties charged, please refer to the instrument, including all buildings, fixtures and fittings, the related rights and the goodwill.

Freehold property known as 74 croydon road, caterham, CR3 6QD, being all of the land and buildings in title SY720463, including all buildings, fixtures and fittings, the related rights and the goodwill.
All that leasehold property known as land on the east side of 74 croydon road, caterham CR3 6QD as the same is registered at the land registry under title number SY856218 with title absolute.

All that freehold property known as 74A-74G (inclusive) croydon road, caterham (CR3 6QD) as the same is registered at the land registry under title number SY720463 with title absolute and the leasehold properties known as flats 74A- 74G croydon road, caterham (CR3 6QD) as the same as are registered at the land registry under title numbers SY831010, SY831011, SY831013, SY831014, SY831015, SY831016 and SY831017.

All that freehold property known as 74A-74G (inclusive) croydon road, caterham (CR3 6QD) as the same is registered at the land registry under title number SY720463 with title absolute and the leasehold properties known as flats 74A- 74G croydon road, caterham (CR3 6QD) as the same as are registered at the land registry under title numbers SY831010, SY831011, SY831013, SY831014, SY831015, SY831016 and SY831017.
